channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The DJI Osmo Action 6 can now record 8K video
item.description: A new update is rolling out now for the DJI Osmo Action 6 that brings with it a host of improvements, including 8K.
item.dc:creator: David Nield, TechRadar

item.title: DoorDash launches Zesty, an AI app for finding local food
item.description: DoorDash launches Zesty, an AI-powered social app that recommends restaurants through conversational search, now testing in San Francisco and New York.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: High severity flaw in MongoDB could allow memory leakage
item.description: Document database vendor MongoDB has advised customers to update immediately following the discovery of a flaw that could allow unauthenticated users to read uninitialized heap memory.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: DoD expands login options beyond CAC
item.description: The memo does not include any requirements for authenticators to be phishing-resistant, even though DoD is required to retire phishable authenticators by 2027. The post DoD expands login options beyond CAC first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: Digitalizar y cooperar para… saber y poder cuidar o curar
item.description: La transformación digital que se está produciendo en el sector salud no sigue un esquema planificado, ni responde a una estrategia explícita planteada por alguno de los múltiples actores que interactúan en nuestro sistema sanitario.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 4 mandates for CIOs to bridge the AI trust gap
item.description: For the third consecutive year, the Thinkers360 AI Trust Index has taken the pulse of sentiment toward AI, and the results, once again, are a stark reminder to CIOs and CXOs that the technological innovation curve continues to outpace the ethical and governance structure required to support it.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: France’s postal service was hit by a major cyberattack right before Christmas. Here are the hackers who did it
item.description: A pro-Russian hacking group claimed responsibility for a major cyberattack that halted package deliveries by France’s national postal service just days before Christmas, prosecutors said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Harmonizing compliance: How oversight modernization can strengthen America’s cyber resilience
item.description: Compliance alone won’t suffice if agencies continue to interpret and implement critical infrastructure security mandates in isolation. The post Harmonizing compliance: How oversight modernization can strengthen America’s cyber resilience first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: How to watch Midnight Mass 2025
item.description: The BBC bring live coverage of the First Mass of the Nativity. Here's how to watch Midnight Mass 2025 online and from anywhere.
item.dc:creator: Tom Wardley, TechRadar

item.title: Get started with Python’s new native JIT
item.description: JITing, or “just-in-time” compilation, can make relatively slow interpreted languages much faster. Until recently, JITting was available for Python only in the form of specialized third-party libraries, like Numba, or alternate versions of the Python interpreter, like PyPy.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Federal News Network’s Industry Exchange Data 2026
item.description: How can agencies manage the challenge of turning data into mission-critical insights — quickly, securely and at scale? The post Federal News Network’s Industry Exchange Data 2026 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network
